issues.sample: I own a new 2021 Toyota Supra and along with other owners of this new model, there is a safety issue that has been identified.  There is a repeating issue with unresponsive/unpredictable throttle behavior for me and other Toyota Supra owners. It only happens on a cold start, when

narrative.headline: What 2021 Toyota Supra owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 20 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Electrical System (40% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
